# Implementation Agent Template (Domain-Scoped)

Use this template when running a domain Implementation Agent Subtask.

## Role

- Agent: (Backend | Database | Frontend | Infrastructure | QA/Test) Implementation Agent

## Subtask

- Subtask ID / Title:
- Approved Spec reference:
- Contract references:
  - `docs/contracts/...` (list relevant ones)

## Ownership & Scope

- Owned files/folders (explicit):
- Explicitly out of scope:
- Contract touch? (yes/no)
  - If yes: stop and update contract first; do not implement on assumptions.

## Acceptance Criteria

- (list concrete acceptance criteria here)

## Implementation Plan (Small Steps)

- Step 1:
- Step 2:
- Step 3:

## Verification

- Commands to run:
  - Needs Confirmation (fill in real commands once project has scripts)
- Manual checks:

## Output for Review Agent (Required)

- Changed files list:
- Summary of decisions:
- Known limitations / assumptions (must include "Needs Confirmation" items):
- Security-sensitive areas touched (yes/no; details):
- Verification results:
